narrative:
Springdale C (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,009 registered voters, with 50.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.7 percentage points.
